title: Royalford Glass Vacuum Flask | Vacuum Insulated Tea Carafe 1000ML | Heat & Cold Retention, Thermal Insulated Airpot | Insulated jug Preserves Flavor & Freshness, Household Office Kettle Jug, Beige
features: KEEPS DRINKS HOT OR COLD– Depending on the type of drink you have put in, this thermo jug preserves the drink and keeps it hot or cold. You can enjoy a juice, tea or hot coffee even after hours with the same warmth or icy freshness. The 1000ml capacity can serve more people at once. Now enjoy your favorite drink on the go!
PRESERVES FLAVOR AND FRESHNESS – Maintains the flavor and retains the original freshness of the drink. You can enjoy the same warm or cold cup of your favorite drink at its best flavor.
CONVENIENT TO USE, 1000ML/33.5oZ – This vacuum coffee pot has a large mouth, and you can easily put ice cubes in it. It is easy to clean.
EASY ONE-HANDED OPERATION: the premium vacuum flask allows comfortable pouring, practical with one hand. Spill proof, there is no splash or splash.

PORTABLE AND LEAK RESISTANT – This vacuum airpot has a compact streamline design and is lightweight. It has a tight lid that fits perfectly and prevents any liquid from falling. It is leak-proof and is safe to be put in a travel bag.
